130001.templatename: Shelby earns star stickers when she does math at school. Yesterday, Shelby earned 4 stars. Today, she earned 3 more. How many stars did Shelby earn in all?

130003.templatename: Helen saw 12 birds in a tree and 7 birds in another tree. How many birds did she see altogether?

130004.templatename: A farmer planted 5 rows of corn before lunch. He planted 7 more rows after lunch. How many rows of corn did he plant during the day?

130005.templatename: There are 6 girls and 7 boys on the bus. How many children are on the bus?

130006.templatename: Stacie caught 5 fish in the morning. She caught 4 more fish in the afternoon. How many fish did Stacie catch in all?

130007.templatename: Maya served 3 yams at lunch and 5 yams during dinner. How many yams were served during the day?

130008.templatename: Kyle got 3 new shirts on his birthday. He already had 5 shirts. How many shirts does he have now?

140002.templatename: Bobby bought 3 more books than Gabby. Gabby bought a book. How many books did Bobby buy?

140003.templatename: There are 10 plates at the dinner table. There are 5 more people than plates. How many people are at dinner?

140004.templatename: Jackie has 9 pencils. Adam has 5 more pencils than Jackie. How many pencils does Adam have?

140005.templatename: Thomas has 2 goats on his farm. There are 6 more chickens than goats on his farm. How many chickens does he have?

140006.templatename: Sarah is 5 years old. Her sister Katie is 2 years older than Sarah. How old is Katie?

140007.templatename: There are 14 chairs in Ms. Bloom's classroom. There are 3 more chairs in Mr. Peter's classroom. How many chairs are there in Mr. Peter's classroom?

140008.templatename: Paul has 7 plums. Brian has 4 more plums than Paul. How many plums does Brian have?

140009.templatename: Marin has 7 balls. Ellen has 6 more balls than Marin. How many balls does Ellen have?

140010.templatename: Bob has 4 pencils and his sister has 8 more pencils than him. How many pencils does Bob's sister have?

150001.templatename: Anita has 5 books. 3 of them are science books and the rest are storybooks. How many are storybooks?

150002.templatename: Michael's cat had 9 kittens. 5 of them are white and the rest are gray. How many gray kittens did the cat have?

150003.templatename: There are 9 children in a classroom. 6 of them are boys. How many girls are in the classroom?

150004.templatename: Ms. Dawson has 12 students in her class. Some students are absent and 7 students are present. How many students are absent?

150005.templatename: There are 16 children in a classroom. Some children go outside to play. 7 children stay inside to read books. How many children are outside?

150006.templatename: Jane has 9 balloons. 6 are green and the rest are blue. How many balloons are blue?

150007.templatename: Katie and her brother picked 6 mangos together. Katie picked 4 mangos. How many mangos did her brother pick?

150008.templatename: Harper and Raven drew 8 pictures together. Harper drew 3 pictures. How many pictures did Raven draw?

150009.templatename: Laci and Kendra caught 14 fireflies altogether. Laci caught 5 fireflies. How many fireflies did Kendra catch?

150010.templatename: A piece of wood is 13 inches long. It is cut into two parts. One part is 6 inches long. How long is the other part?

160001.templatename: A farmer had 7 apple trees. She bought some more trees and now has 10 apple trees in her orchard. How many apple trees did she buy?

160002.templatename: A football team scored 3 goals in the first half. Then they scored more goals in the second half. They won the game with 5 goals! How many goals did they socre in the second half?

160003.templatename: Peter read 6 pages of his book before lunch. After lunch he read some more. If Peter read 9 pages in all, how many pages did he read after lunch?

160004.templatename: George went to a store and bought some t-shirts. He went to another store and bought 2 more t-shirts. He bought a total of 7 t-shirts. How many t-shirts did he buy at the first store?

160005.templatename: You have some stamps. Your brother gives 6 stamps to you. Now you have 10 stamps. How many stamps did you start with?

160006.templatename: Tess picked 3 flowers in the morning. She picked some more flowers in the afternoon. If Tess picked 8 flowers in all, how many did she pick in the afternoon?

160007.templatename: There are some crickets in a jar. You collect 5 more crickets and now have 10 crickets in all. How many crickets did you start with?

160008.templatename: There were some seashells in Megan's pail. She finds 2 more seashells. Now she has 8 seashells in all. How many seashells did she start with?

160009.templatename: Kelly saw 4 cats in front of her house. She went to sleep and when she woke up, there were 7 cats in front of her house. How many cats came to her house while she was sleeping?

160010.templatename: Peter has 4 marbles. Sue gives Peter some marbles and now he has 6 marbles in all. How many marbles did Sue give Peter?

220001.templatename: Millie has 9 bracelets. She loses 2 of them. How many bracelets does Millie have left?

220002.templatename: Hannah makes 8 loaves of bread. She gives 3 loaves of bread to her cousin. How many loaves of bread does she have left?

220003.templatename: There are 9 kites flying in the sky. A wind blows 3 kites down on the ground. How many kites are still flying in the sky?

220005.templatename: Lena has 12 books. She donates 8 books to her class library. How many books does Lena have left?

220006.templatename: There are 12 cats on a fence. 1 cat jumps down off of the fence. How many cats are left on the fence?

230005.templatename: Beth has 13 flowers in her garden. Kate has 8 flowers. How many more flowers does Beth have than Kate?

230007.templatename: Maria read 3 books and Stacy read 5 books. How many more books did Stacy read than Maria?

230010.templatename: Tom planted 5 seeds in a school garden. Jane planted 8 seeds. How many fewer seeds did Tom plant than Jane?

240001.templatename: I have 10 apples. I eat some apples. I have 4 apples left. How many apples did I eat?

240002.templatename: Yesterday, the store had 7 bags of rice. Today, the store has 2 bags of rice. How many bags of rice did the store sell?

240003.templatename: David and his friends fly 9 kites. Some kites get stuck in a tree. 6 kites are still flying. How many kites are stuck in the tree?

240004.templatename: A man was carrying balloons but the wind blew 6 away. He has 2 balloons left. How many balloons did he start with?

240008.templatename: Tim's dog gave birth to some puppies. Tim gave 6 puppies to his friends. Now he has 2 puppies left. How many puppies did his dog give birth to?

240009.templatename: Jen made 6 sandwiches for her family. Her family ate some and 2 were left. How many sandwiches did her family eat?

240010.templatename: 7 boys ride their bikes. Some of the boys go home. 5 boys continue riding their bikes. How many boys went home?

260001.templatename: Miranda baked 18 brownies. She put an equal number of brownies on to 2 plates. How many brownies are on each plate?
